name: lean4-skills-lite
description: Lightweight Lean 4 skills for library search and proof assistance

interface.longDescription: Search Lean 4 libraries such as Mathlib, Init, Std, and Batteries for lemmas, definitions, type patterns, and proof premises.
defaultPrompt: Use Lean 4 Skills Lite to find a Mathlib theorem for this goal.
Use Lean 4 Skills Lite to search Lean libraries for this type pattern.
